components.name: Alpha RA2045F-20 LED Slider
components.verification: Taiwan Alpha RA2045F-20 illuminated slide datasheet: single unit, 20mm travel, PC board vertical terminal, LED colors A/B/G/R, 7mm mounting height. For T=20mm: rear/PCB body length T+10 = 30mm, front rail/slot visual class T+11 = 31mm, practical actuator slot modeled as 3.0×27.0mm, overall metal/keepout envelope class T+15 = 35mm. LC insulated lever drawing shows approx 6.0mm top width, 5.5mm inner width, 6.6mm base, lever length L=10/15mm options. Visual LED cap size is intentionally kept at the previous compact 3.2×4.4mm appearance for the panel designer.
components.label: FM
